title: Rearrange Products Table
description: Unpivot a wide products table (product_id, store1, store2, store3) to long format (product_id, store, price).
constraints: store1, store2, store3 prices can be NULL (product not sold there — exclude those rows)
key_concept: UNION ALL to unpivot wide format to long format. One SELECT per column. Filter NULL prices.

hints.L1: Write one SELECT per store column. UNION ALL them together.
hints.L2: SELECT product_id, 'store1' AS store, store1 AS price FROM Products WHERE store1 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL ...
hints.L3: SELECT product_id, 'store1' AS store, store1 AS price FROM Products WHERE store1 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT product_id, 'store2', store2 FROM Products WHERE store2 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT product_id, 'store3', store3 FROM Products WHERE store3 IS NOT NULL
